hero.headline: Your vision is our mission
hero.subtitle: Advanced ophthalmology care with cutting-edge technology and compassionate specialists dedicated to your vision health.

services.title: Comprehensive Eye Exams
services.description: Thorough examinations detecting vision problems and eye diseases at their earliest stages.

services.title: LASIK Surgery
services.description: Advanced laser vision correction for a life free from glasses and contact lenses.

services.title: Cataract Surgery
services.description: Modern phacoemulsification with premium intraocular lens options for crystal clear vision.

services.title: Glaucoma Treatment
services.description: Early detection and management of glaucoma to preserve your precious sight.

services.title: Retina Care
services.description: Specialized treatment for retinal disorders including diabetic retinopathy and macular degeneration.

services.title: Pediatric Eye Care
services.description: Gentle, specialized eye care for children from infancy through adolescence.

reasons.title: State-of-the-Art Technology
reasons.description: We invest in the latest diagnostic and surgical equipment to provide the most accurate diagnoses and effective treatments.

reasons.title: Experienced Specialists
reasons.description: Our team of board-certified ophthalmologists brings decades of combined experience to every patient encounter.

reasons.title: Patient-First Approach
reasons.description: We take time to understand your concerns, explain your options clearly, and tailor treatment to your unique needs.

aboutDoctor.headline: Expert Care You Can Trust
aboutDoctor.paragraph1: Dr. Foster is a fellowship-trained ophthalmologist specializing in corneal diseases and refractive surgery. Her commitment to patient care and surgical excellence has made her one of the region's most trusted eye care specialists.

process.title: Book Your Appointment
process.description: Schedule online or call us. We offer flexible hours including evenings and weekends.

process.title: Comprehensive Consultation
process.description: Your specialist performs a thorough examination and discusses your vision concerns and goals.

process.title: Personalized Treatment Plan
process.description: Receive a tailored treatment plan using the latest evidence-based approaches.

process.title: Clear Vision Achieved
process.description: Follow-up care ensures optimal results and long-term vision health.

dentalHealth.mainParagraph: We believe prevention is the key to healthy vision. Our comprehensive approach ensures long-term eye health.

features.topBarCustomText: Welcome to ClinicMaster - Call us to book an appointment!

reviews.name: James Rodriguez
reviews.text: After LASIK surgery here, I can see clearly for the first time in 20 years. The entire team was professional and caring throughout.

reviews.name: Fatima Al-Hassan
reviews.text: The cataract surgery changed my life. Dr. Mitchell explained everything clearly and the results exceeded my expectations.

reviews.name: Marie Dubois
reviews.text: Exceptional eye care from a team that truly cares. My annual exams always detect issues early. I trust them completely.

seo.metaDescription: Expert eye care including LASIK surgery, cataract treatment, comprehensive eye exams, and pediatric ophthalmology.
seo.metaKeywords: ophthalmology, eye care, LASIK surgery, cataract treatment, eye exams, vision care

cta.successMessage: Thank you! We'll contact you soon.
cta.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.companyDescription: Providing premium eye care since 2005. We combine the world's best specialists with modern medical technology to deliver unmatched vision outcomes.
